description: The Haghani Seminary (Madrasa-ye Haghani) is a hardline Islamic seminary in Qom co-founded by [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati) and [Mohammad-Taqi Mesbah Yazdi](/people/mohammad-taqi-mesbah-yazdi). It has trained a disproportionate number of the Islamic Republic's intelligence, security, and judicial officials. Graduates are heavily represented in the judiciary, the Ministry of Intelligence, and the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council). It is considered one of the most ideologically extreme training grounds in the Shia seminary system.
editorial_notes: Known informally as the 'school of power' for its influence on security services.
